title: taraxacum microspermum
intro: Taraxacum microspermum, also known as dwarf dandelion or small-flowered dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which contain high levels of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. These compounds are believed to have health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in the prevention and treatment of various diseases, such as liver and kidney issues, as well as certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum microspermum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and support overall well-being.
